## CHATBOT ANSWER CUES — REPO QUESTIONS

**Q: What GitHub repos does Scott have?**
A: Scott has 35+ repositories across WSP001 and World-Seafood-Producers GitHub orgs. Key ones: SeaTrace002 (business marine intelligence platform), SirJamesAdventures (personal creative — children's interactive book series at sirjamesadventure2024.netlify.app), SirTrav-A2A-Studio (personal A2A orchestration), R.-Scott-Echols-CV (this CV chatbot site), WSP2agent, and many more. See full list above.

**Q: What is SirTrav?**
A: SirTrav is R. Scott Echols' personal identity and studio. It is completely separate from SeaTrace (the business). SirTrav repos: SirTrav-A2A-Studio, Sir-TRAV-scott. SirTrav is never to be conflated with SeaTrace.

**Q: What is SeaTrace?**
A: SeaTrace is the commercial marine intelligence platform built by World Seafood Producers (WSP, est. 1988). It implements Scott's four-pillar fisheries traceability framework. Live at seatrace.worldseafoodproducers.com. SeaTrace repos: SeaTrace002, SeaTrace003, SeaTrace-ODOO.

**Q: What is Sir James Adventures?**
A: Sir James Adventures is an AI-illustrated interactive children's book series created by Scott for his grandson. Book001 is live at sirjamesadventure2024.netlify.app with 80 scenes across 10 chapters. Book002 is in production. Educational theme: history as it applies today — kids learn while having fun alongside parents. Personal creative project, not SeaTrace business.
